prompt.description: Text description of the video content to generate.

model.description: Model identifier. Use seedance-2.0 for standard or seedance-2.0-fast for fast generation.

duration.description: Video length in seconds. 4 to 15, any integer.

mode.description: Resolution tier. RESOLUTION_480 for 480p, RESOLUTION_720 for 720p.

width.description: Video width in pixels. Set to 0 for auto-match source image aspect ratio (image-to-video).

height.description: Video height in pixels. Set to 0 for auto-match source image aspect ratio (image-to-video).

prompt_enhance.description: Prompt enhancement. Automatically disabled when start_frame is set.

motion_has_audio.description: Generate native audio including dialogue, narration, sound effects, and ambient sounds.

public.description: Whether the generated video is public.

guidances.start_frame.description: Start frame image. Cannot coexist with image_reference or video_reference_base.

guidances.end_frame.description: End frame image. REQUIRES start_frame. Cannot coexist with image_reference or video_reference_base.

guidances.image_reference.description: Reference images for style/composition. Cannot coexist with start_frame or end_frame.

guidances.video_reference_base.description: Reference videos for motion guidance. Cannot coexist with start_frame or end_frame.

rules: VIDEO model — duration 4-15 seconds (any integer). Default 8.
DO NOT set style — not available for video models.
DO NOT set negativePrompt — not available for this model.
Prompt max 1500 characters.
mode: only RESOLUTION_480 or RESOLUTION_720. NO 1080p option.
7 aspect ratios × 2 resolutions = 14 valid dimension combos (most of any model).
Also supports ultra-wide: 21:9 and 9:21.
prompt_enhance: available for video — ON by default, auto-OFF when start_frame is set.
motion_has_audio: generates dialogue, narration, sound effects, ambient sounds.
seed: range 0–4294967295. -1 = random. Use for reproducibility.
quantity: always 1 (hard max).
MUTUAL EXCLUSION — pick ONE guidance mode:
Mode A: start_frame ± end_frame (image-to-video)
Mode B: image_reference alone (style/composition guidance, max 4)
Mode C: video_reference_base alone (motion guidance, max 3)
Modes B and C can coexist (image + video references together).
start_frame/end_frame CANNOT combine with image_reference or video_reference_base.
end_frame REQUIRES start_frame.
Setting width=0, height=0 = auto-match source image aspect ratio (image-to-video only).
Fast variant: seedance-2.0-fast uses same params, same spec, faster generation.
